flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Northern Kentucky University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Northern Kentucky University rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 (30.6% → 36.4%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Northern Kentucky University are 12% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($50.2k vs $44.7k).
